name: Maddy Smith
blurb: She is widely recognized for her multi-season run as a cast member on MTV's Wild N Out and hosts the podcast Mad House.
bio: Maddy Smith is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and actress from Buffalo, New York, known for a fast, machine-gun joke delivery. She is widely recognized for her multi-season run as a cast member on MTV's Wild N Out and hosts the podcast Mad House.

timeline.ev: Named a comic to watch at the New York Comedy Festival
Joins the cast of MTV Wild N Out

accolades: Multi-season cast member of MTV Wild N Out
Host of the Mad House podcast

bits.t: Maddy Smith is NOT Nick Cannons Baby Mama
